## Comprehensive Project Overview: /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol

### Project Description
**lol** is a Raycast UI clone built with modern web technologies. It's a pixel-perfect recreation of the Raycast interface for internal use. The project follows strict standards with emphasis on code quality, accessibility, and professional delivery.

---

### Tech Stack & Dependencies

**Runtime & Package Manager:**
- Bun 1.3.6 (runtime and package manager)
- Node.js >=20.0.0

**Core Dependencies:**
- React 19.2.4
- React DOM 19.2.4
- marked 17.0.3 (markdown parsing)
- dompurify 3.3.1 (HTML sanitization)

**Dev Dependencies:**
- TypeScript 5.9.3 (strict mode)
- Vite 7.3.1 (bundler)
- Sass 1.97.3 (styling)
- Vitest 4.0.18 (testing)
- ESLint 10.0.2 + TypeScript ESLint 8.56.1
- Prettier 3.7.4 with plugins
- React Testing Library 16.3.2

---

### Project Structure

```
/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/
├── src/
│   ├── App.tsx                          # Main application component
│   ├── main.tsx                         # React entry point
│   ├── types.ts                         # TypeScript type definitions
│   ├── vite-env.d.ts                    # Vite environment types
│   ├── test_setup.ts                    # Test configuration
│   │
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── action_panel/
│   │   │   ├── action_panel.tsx         # Footer action panel component
│   │   │   └── action_panel.scss
│   │   │
│   │   ├── command_palette/
│   │   │   ├── command_palette.tsx      # Main container/overlay
│   │   │   └── command_palette.scss
│   │   │
│   │   ├── detail/
│   │   │   ├── detail.tsx               # Detail view with markdown rendering
│   │   │   ├── detail_metadata.tsx      # Metadata components (Label, Link, TagList, Tag)
│   │   │   ├── detail.scss
│   │   │   └── index.ts                 # Barrel export
│   │   │
│   │   ├── empty_state/
│   │   │   ├── empty_state.tsx          # Empty state display
│   │   │   └── empty_state.scss
│   │   │
│   │   ├── kbd/
│   │   │   ├── kbd.tsx                  # Keyboard shortcut display
│   │   │   └── kbd.scss
│   │   │
│   │   ├── list/
│   │   │   ├── list.tsx                 # Main list container (keyboard navigation)
│   │   │   ├── list_context.tsx         # React Context for list state
│   │   │   ├── list.scss
│   │   │   ├── index.ts                 # Barrel export
│   │   │   ├── list_item/
│   │   │   │   ├── list_item.tsx        # Individual list item with icon, title, accessories
│   │   │   │   └── list_item.scss
│   │   │   └── list_section/
│   │   │       ├── list_section.tsx     # List section grouping
│   │   │       └── list_section.scss
│   │   │
│   │   └── search_bar/
│   │       ├── search_bar.tsx           # Search input with icon
│   │       └── search_bar.scss
│   │
│   ├── data/
│   │   └── mock_data.ts                 # Mock sections and items for demo
│   │
│   └── styles/
│       ├── _tokens.scss                 # Design tokens (colors, spacing, typography, etc.)
│       └── global.scss                  # Global styles, animations, resets
│
├── Configuration Files
│   ├── package.json                     # Project metadata and scripts
│   ├── tsconfig.json                    # TypeScript strict mode configuration
│   ├── vite.config.ts                   # Vite bundler configuration
│   ├── eslint.config.js                 # ESLint rules
│   ├── prettier.config.mjs              # Prettier formatting
│   ├── index.html                       # HTML entry point
│   ├── .npmrc                           # npm configuration
│   └── .gitignore                       # Git ignore patterns
│
├── Build & Dev
│   ├── dist/                            # Build output directory
│   ├── bun.lock                         # Lockfile
│   └── .loop/                           # Ralph loop implementation artifacts
│
├── Documentation & Instructions
│   ├── README.md                        # Project readme
│   ├── CLAUDE.md                        # Project-specific instructions
│   └── loop.ts                          # Ralph loop implementation
```

---

### Key Configuration Files

**tsconfig.json**
- Strict mode enabled (strictNullChecks, noImplicitAny, noUnusedLocals, etc.)
- Target: ES2022
- JSX: react-jsx
- Path alias: `@/*` → `./src/*`
- Source maps and declaration files enabled

**vite.config.ts**
- React plugin enabled
- Path alias configured for `@/`
- Sass with modern-compiler API
- Vitest environment: jsdom
- Global test setup: `./src/test_setup.ts`

**eslint.config.js**
- ESLint + TypeScript recommended configs
- `@typescript-eslint/no-namespace`: off
- `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`: warn
- `@typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-function-type`: error

---

### NPM Scripts

```json
{
  "build": "vite build",                         // Production build
  "dev": "vite",                                 // Dev server with HMR
  "test": "vitest run --passWithNoTests",        // Run tests once
  "test:watch": "vitest --watch --passWithNoTests", // Watch mode
  "coverage": "vitest --coverage",               // Test coverage report
  "check": "run-s check:*",                      // Run all checks
  "check:types": "tsc --noEmit",                 // Type checking
  "check:lint": "eslint src --fix",              // Lint and fix
  "check:format": "prettier --write ."           // Format code
}
```

---

### Design Tokens (_tokens.scss)

**Colors:**
- Background: `#1a1a1c` (dark)
- Surface: `#262628`
- Surface hover: `#2e2e30`
- Border: `#3a3a3c`
- Text primary: `#f5f5f7`
- Text secondary: `#98989d`
- Text tertiary: `#6e6e73`
- Accent: `#007aff` (blue)
- Destructive: `#ff453a` (red)

**Spacing Scale (multiplied by 4px):**
- `$space-1`: 4px through `$space-8`: 32px

**Border Radius:**
- Small: 4px, Medium: 8px, Large: 12px, XLarge: 16px

**Shadows:**
- Window shadow (16px blur, 2x layers)
- Popover shadow (8px blur, 2x layers)

**Typography:**
- Font family: System stack (SF Pro, Segoe UI, etc.)
- Mono: SF Mono
- Sizes: xs (11px) through xl (20px)
- Weight: 600 (semibold)

**Animation:**
- Transitions: 80ms (fast), 150ms (normal), 250ms (slow)
- Keyframes: palette-appear, action-panel-slide-up

---

### Core Components

**CommandPalette** (`command_palette/`)
- Wrapper component providing overlay styling
- Contains search bar, list, and action panel

**SearchBar** (`search_bar/`)
- Input field with search icon
- Auto-focuses on mount
- ARIA compliant (combobox role)
- Controls list via aria-activedescendant

**List** (`list/`)
- Container managing keyboard navigation (arrow up/down, enter)
- Provides ListContext for nested items
- Handles auto-scroll to active item
- Manages active index state

**ListSection** (`list_section/`)
- Groups list items with header
- Semantic grouping (role="group")

**ListItem** (`list_item/`)
- Displays title, subtitle, icon, accessories
- Responds to arrow key navigation and mouse hover
- Aria-selected state management

**Detail** (`detail/`)
- Renders markdown content (sanitized with DOMPurify)
- Displays optional metadata section
- Uses marked library for markdown parsing

**DetailMetadata** (`detail_metadata/`)
- MetadataLabel: Key-value pairs
- MetadataLink: Clickable links
- MetadataTagList: Colored tag collections
- MetadataTag: Individual tags with 6 color options (blue, green, orange, red, purple, yellow)
- MetadataSeparator: Visual divider

**ActionPanel** (`action_panel/`)
- Footer toolbar with actions
- Supports primary action + secondary actions
- Each action displays shortcut key combination

**Kbd** (`kbd/`)
- Renders keyboard shortcut symbols (⌘, ↵, etc.)

**EmptyState** (`empty_state/`)
- Shows icon, title, and optional description
- Used when no search results

---

### Type Definitions (types.ts)

```typescript
interface ListItemData {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  icon?: ReactNode;
  accessories?: ListItemAccessoryData[];
  detail?: ListItemDetailData;
}

interface ListItemDetailData {
  markdown: string;
  metadata?: ListItemMetadataEntry[];
}

type ListItemMetadataEntry = 
  | { type: 'label'; title: string; text?: string; }
  | { type: 'link'; title: string; text: string; target: string; }
  | { type: 'tag-list'; title: string; tags: Array<{ text: string; color?: TagColor; }>; }
  | { type: 'separator'; };

interface SectionData {
  title: string;
  items: ListItemData[];
}
```

---

### Key Features

1. **Search Filtering**: Real-time search across items and subtitles
2. **Keyboard Navigation**: Arrow keys, Enter, Meta shortcuts
3. **Markdown Rendering**: Safe HTML from markdown with DOMPurify
4. **Keyboard-Friendly**: ARIA labels, roles, and accessibility attributes
5. **Responsive Layout**: Two-column design (list + detail)
6. **Design Token System**: Centralized styling via Sass variables
7. **Type Safety**: Strict TypeScript everywhere
8. **Pixel-Perfect UI**: Modeled after Raycast

---

### Project Principles (from CLAUDE.md)

- **No comments** unless JSDoc needed for public API
- **No over-engineering**: No abstractions for single-use cases
- **Small components**: Keep components composable
- **File naming**: snake_case for utilities, PascalCase for components
- **One .scss per component**: Separate style files
- **Strict TypeScript**: All strict compiler options enabled
- **Bun only**: Never npm/yarn
- **Professional quality**: Every task delivered without workarounds
- **Visual testing**: Playwright MCP required for visual components
- **No makeshift solutions**: All tasks tracked and completed properly

---

### Important Directories

- `/src/components/` - All UI components (11 total, tree-shakeable via index.ts)
- `/src/styles/` - Global styles and design tokens
- `/src/data/` - Mock data for development
- `/dist/` - Production build output
- `/.loop/` - Ralph loop implementation artifacts (context management)

This is a well-architected, production-ready Raycast UI clone with strict adherence to TypeScript, accessibility standards, and professional code quality practices.
